title: AirTerminal
description: AirTerminal: A device used to regulate the volume of air to or from an air handling unit, variable air volume device or similar, to or from the occupied space. These devices may be ducted or connect directly to a plenum, in which case no duct connection will be present.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

AirFlowRate.description: The volume of air being conveyed by the Duct per second (m3/s). Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate meassured in [m³/s].

PressureDrop.description: The difference in total pressure between two points of a system measured in Pascals. Property has a quantity of type Pressure meassured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
